scripts.migration:generate: node -r dotenv/config -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:generate -d src/db/data-source.ts
scripts.migration:run: node -r dotenv/config -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:run -d src/db/data-source.ts
scripts.migration:revert: node -r dotenv/config -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:revert -d src/db/data-source.ts
scripts.migration:create: node -r dotenv/config -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:create
